title: Attribute Icons (RPG Series)
body:
# Attribute Icons (RPG Series)

This resourcepack adds:

*   font providers, overriding some unicode characters with attribute skill icon images
*   translation override entries, targeting some attribute translations to add relevant icons to the beginning of the text

Supported attributes:

*   vanilla combat and tool related attributes
*   Better Combat attack range
*   Combat Roll attributes
*   Ranged Weapon API attributes
*   Spell Engine attributes
*   Spell Power attributes
